title: Age of Travel: Rewritten
description: Travel to the past to visit dinosaurs, or revive them using machines!
body:
![All the entities on the mod.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/869b0fd8ecfd2f1db7ab37093857a7bf441f7d62.png)
## This mod requires:
### [GeckoLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)
### [Pehkui](https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui)
## Otherwise, it will not work.
 

### _What its Age of Travel?_
Age of Travel it's a forge mod, based on prehistoric environments that focus on add extinct flora and fauna into minecraft. The flora and fauna can also be found on a new dimension called Pangea, it's a post nether dimension where almost everything from the mod can be found.
 
Almost every creatures has unique and different features that can be explored in game or searched through the Paleopedia, a guide with information of the mod, and those creatures that don't have a Unique feature, will be updated and polished.

### _Documentation._
The mod itself provides a crafteable guide inside of it, where almost all the important information of the mod can be found. In case you want to know about complex mechanics, they can be found in the description of the mod page.

### _Actual creatures on the mod_
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
Update 1.1.0
  
- Herrerasaurus
- Carcharodontosaurus
- Eotriceratops
- Neeyambaspis
- Suevoleviathan
- Xuwulong
- Iberospinus
- Amber Mosquito
- Anomalocaris
- Beelzebufo

</details>


### _Creatures Mechanics and Functions_

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Herrerasaurus: When attacked an entity, it will go to hunt it, like wolves, but a bit stronger.
Carcharodontosaurus: When he bites a shield, it has a 20% chance to drop his tooth, that can be used for a usefull weapon. Also, when attack, it will grant the Carved effect, a effect very similar to wither.

- Eotriceratops: Has a unique knockback.

- Neeyambaspis: N/A

- Suevoleviathan: N/A

- Xuwulong: Can be tamed using cooksonia.

- Iberospinus: Can be mounted or 
sheared to get his scales, that can be used later for a Swamp Macuahuitl, a usefull tool that can deal extra area damage.

- Anomalocaris: N/A

- Beelzebufo: N/A

- Amber Mosquito: Depending his color, the DNA he will drop, every color of mosquito has a different spawn biome. Being:

Lush Caves - Plant DNA

Deep Dark - Fungus DNA

Dripstone - Water Creature DNA

Other Caves - Animal DNA

</details>

 [You can also join to the Discord server](https://discord.gg/z85XynXzCq)
